text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
choice_data_list: Did you get a lot of rest?
Did you get a lot of rest?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I had a great day off!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Flash gave me some of her stollen cake, and we
ate it while watching my favorite performer on
UMATV!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm super-charged! Next stop, top Umadol! ☆

Smart Falcon seems fully recharged after a good
rest.
